settings.title: Choose a Time That Works for You

settings.editor:
• 🎯  We learn about your brand: your goals, your audience, and the story you want to tell.
  • 📸  We explore your vision: the look, feel, and emotional impact you're aiming for.
  • 💡  We share ideas: concepts, locations, and approaches that fit your brand perfectly.
  • ✅  We assess fit, because the best work happens when photographer and client are genuinely aligned.
  • 📋  Next steps: if it's a great fit, we'll outline a tailored proposal. No pressure either way.

The Details

📅 30 minutes via Zoom or phone
📍 Available UK-wide
🎁 Completely free, no obligation
⏱ Response within 24 hours of booking
Prefer to reach out by email first? Use the contact form →

tabs.tab_title: Do I need to prepare anything before the call?
tabs.tab_content: Not at all. Just show up as you are. If you have a few thoughts about your brand or some visual references you love, feel free to share them, but it's absolutely not required. The conversation will naturally surface everything we need.

tabs.tab_title: How quickly will I get a proposal after the call?
tabs.tab_content: If we're a great fit, you'll receive a tailored proposal within 48 hours of your discovery call. It will include a recommended package, an outline of what we'll create together, and investment details.

tabs.tab_title: What if I'm not ready to book but want to learn more?
tabs.tab_content: That's completely fine. The discovery call is exactly the right place to start. There's no expectation to commit on the day. Many of our best client relationships began with a relaxed exploratory conversation months before the shoot.

tabs.tab_title: Do you work with clients outside Brighton?
tabs.tab_content: Yes, XC Photography shoots across the UK. We travel for the right brief. Travel costs for locations more than 50 miles from Brighton are outlined transparently in your proposal.

tabs.tab_title: What if I need to reschedule?
tabs.tab_content: No problem at all. Use the reschedule link in your booking confirmation email, or email info@xcphotography.co.uk and we'll sort it within the hour.
